module_purpose_statements.docstring:
Unit tests for the Brownfield Cartographer agents.

Tests cover:
- Surveyor: module parsing, dead code detection, git velocity
- Hydrologist: lineage event construction, blast_radius, sources/sinks
- Navigator: all 4 tools, intent inference, parameter extraction
- Archivist: CODEBASE.md generation
- KnowledgeGraph: schema validation (see test_knowledge_graph_deserialization.py)

five_fde_day_one_answers.q1_primary_ingestion_path: Primary ingestion appears to flow from source datasets not explicitly discovered into downstream transformations. Evidence: src\agents\navigator.py:L16-L16; tests\test_agents.py:L432-L432; tests\test_agents.py:L551-L551
five_fde_day_one_answers.q2_critical_outputs: Most critical outputs are likely terminal lineage sinks not explicitly discovered and high-centrality modules from Surveyor PageRank. Evidence: src\agents\navigator.py:L16-L16; tests\test_agents.py:L432-L432; tests\test_agents.py:L551-L551
five_fde_day_one_answers.q3_blast_radius: Blast radius is highest around sink-producing transformations and architectural hubs; recently active files include ['README.md', '.cartography/module_graph.json', 'src/cli.py', 'pyproject.toml', 'src/agents/hydrologist.py']. Evidence: src\agents\navigator.py:L16-L16; tests\test_agents.py:L432-L432; tests\test_agents.py:L551-L551
five_fde_day_one_answers.q4_logic_concentration: Business logic is most concentrated in the inferred domain 'ingestion', with representative modules ['main.py', 'README.md', 'RECONNAISSANCE.md']. Evidence: src\agents\navigator.py:L16-L16; tests\test_agents.py:L432-L432; tests\test_agents.py:L551-L551
five_fde_day_one_answers.q5_git_velocity_map: Git velocity hot spots are derived from Surveyor high-velocity core: ['README.md', '.cartography/module_graph.json', 'src/cli.py', 'pyproject.toml', 'src/agents/hydrologist.py']; dead-code candidates identified: 8. Evidence: src\agents\navigator.py:L16-L16; tests\test_agents.py:L432-L432; tests\test_agents.py:L551-L551
